recommendations.title: Air Bud: Golden Receiver
recommendations.overview: Josh and Buddy move from basketball to football in this first of several sequels to the original Air Bud.

recommendations.title: Back to the Future Part II
recommendations.overview: Marty and Doc are at it again as the time-traveling duo head to 2015 to nip some McFly family woes in the bud. But things go awry thanks to bully Biff Tannen and a pesky sports almanac. In a last-ditch attempt to set things straight, Marty finds hims

recommendations.title: Air Buddies
recommendations.overview: The offspring of sportsman canine Air Bud: B-Dawg, Mudbud, Budderball, Buddha, and Rosebud, uncover a kidnapping plot motivated by a little rich boy's desire to have the world's most athletic dog as a pet.

recommendations.title: Kingdom of the Spiders
recommendations.overview: Investigating the mysterious deaths of a number of farm animals, vet Rack Hansen discovers that his town lies in the path of hordes of migrating tarantulas. Before he can take action, the streets are overrun by killer spiders, trapping a small group

recommendations.title: Kiki's Delivery Service
recommendations.overview: A young witch, on her mandatory year of independent life, finds fitting into a new community difficult while she supports herself by running an air courier service.

recommendations.title: Abbott and Costello Meet the Mummy
recommendations.overview: Stranded in Egypt, Bud and Lou find themselves in the buried tomb of a living mummy.

recommendations.title: Air Bud: World Pup
recommendations.overview: In this second heartwarming and hilarious sequel to the popular favorite, Air Bud masters two new starring roles: soccer player and fatherhood. Loaded with laughs and cool soccer action, Buddy teams up alongside U.S. women's soccer greats.

recommendations.title: Elemental
recommendations.overview: In a city where fire, water, land and air residents live together, a fiery young woman and a go-with-the-flow guy will discover something elemental: how much they have in common.

recommendations.title: Like Mike 2: Streetball
recommendations.overview: Another young boy with 'hoop dreams' finds an old pair of Michael Jordan's sneakers and can suddenly play ball like the greatest player in the world.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.
